label: Kaalia of the Vast
desc: Mardu commander deck led by Kaalia of the Vast — cheating Angels, Demons, and Dragons into play.

cards.name: Faithless Looting

Draw two cards, then discard two cards.

cards.name: Thrilling Discovery
cards.text: You gain 2 life. Then you may discard two cards. If you do, draw three cards.

cards.name: Sign in Blood

cards.text: You draw two cards and lose 2 life.

cards.name: Kaalia of the Vast
cards.text:
Flying
Whenever Kaalia attacks an opponent, you may put an Angel, Demon, or Dragon creature card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped and attacking that opponent.

cards.name: Karmic Guide
cards.text:
Flying, protection from black
Echo {3}{W}{W} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.)
When this creature enters, return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

cards.name: Archfiend of Despair
cards.text:
Flying
Your opponents can't gain life.
At the beginning of each end step, each opponent loses life equal to the life that player lost this turn. (Damage causes loss of life.)

cards.name: Archon of Cruelty
cards.text:
Flying
Whenever this creature enters or attacks, target opponent sacrifices a creature or planeswalker of their choice, discards a card, and loses 3 life. You draw a card and gain 3 life.

cards.name: Angel of Despair
cards.text:
Flying
When this creature enters, destroy target permanent.

cards.name: Balefire Dragon
cards.text:
Flying
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, it deals that much damage to each creature that player controls.

cards.name: Animate Dead
cards.text:
Enchant creature card in a graveyard
When this Aura enters, if it's on the battlefield, it loses "enchant creature card in a graveyard" and gains "enchant creature put onto the battlefield with this Aura." Return enchanted creature card to the battlefield under your control and attach this Aura to it. When this Aura leaves the battlefield, that creature's controller sacrifices it.
Enchanted creature gets -1/-0.

cards.name: Reanimate
cards.text: Put target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. You lose life equal to that card's mana value.

cards.name: Avacyn, Angel of Hope
cards.text:
Flying, vigilance, indestructible
Other permanents you control have indestructible.

cards.name: Lyra Dawnbringer
cards.text:
Flying
First strike (This creature deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.)
Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)
Other Angels you control get +1/+1 and have lifelink.

cards.name: Angel of Finality
cards.text:
Flying
When this creature enters, exile target player's graveyard.

cards.name: Angelic Arbiter
cards.text:
Flying
Each opponent who cast a spell this turn can't attack with creatures.
Each opponent who attacked with a creature this turn can't cast spells.

cards.name: Aurelia, the Warleader
cards.text:
Flying, vigilance, haste
Whenever Aurelia attacks for the first time each turn, untap all creatures you control. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

cards.name: Gisela, Blade of Goldnight
cards.text:
Flying, first strike
If a source would deal damage to an opponent or a permanent an opponent controls, that source deals double that damage to that player or permanent instead.
If a source would deal damage to you or a permanent you control, prevent half that damage, rounded up.

cards.name: Resplendent Angel
cards.text:
Flying
At the beginning of each end step, if you gained 5 or more life this turn, create a 4/4 white Angel creature token with flying and vigilance.
{3}{W}{W}{W}: Until end of turn, this creature gets +2/+2 and gains lifelink.

cards.name: Angel of Sanctions
cards.text:
Flying
When this creature enters, you may exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this creature leaves the battlefield.
Embalm {5}{W} ({5}{W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a token that's a copy of it, except it's a white Zombie Angel with no mana cost. Embalm only as a sorcery.)

cards.name: Emeria Shepherd
cards.text:
Flying
Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, you may return target nonland permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. If that land is a Plains, you may return that nonland permanent card to the battlefield instead.

cards.name: Harvester of Souls
cards.text:
Deathtouch (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.)
Whenever another nontoken creature dies, you may draw a card.

cards.name: Demonlord Belzenlok
cards.text:
Flying, trample
When Demonlord Belzenlok enters, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card, then put that card into your hand. If the card's mana value is 4 or greater, repeat this process. Demonlord Belzenlok deals 1 damage to you for each card put into your hand this way.

cards.name: Doom Whisperer
cards.text:
Flying, trample
Pay 2 life: Surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

cards.name: Rakdos, Lord of Riots
cards.text:
You can't cast Rakdos unless an opponent lost life this turn.
Flying, trample
Creature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast for each 1 life your opponents have lost this turn.

cards.name: Master of Cruelties
cards.text:
First strike, deathtouch
This creature can only attack alone.
Whenever this creature attacks a player and isn't blocked, that player's life total becomes 1. This creature assigns no combat damage this combat.

cards.name: Dragonlord Kolaghan
cards.text:
Flying, haste

Whenever an opponent casts a creature or planeswalker spell with the same name as a card in their graveyard, that player loses 10 life.

Flying

cards.name: Glorybringer

Flying, haste
You may exert this creature as it attacks. When you do, it deals 4 damage to target non-Dragon creature an opponent controls. (An exerted creature won't untap during your next untap step.)

cards.name: Hellkite Tyrant
cards.text:
Flying, trample
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, gain control of all artifacts that player controls.
At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control twenty or more artifacts, you win the game.

Flying

cards.name: Crackling Doom
cards.text: Crackling Doom deals 2 damage to each opponent. Each opponent sacrifices a creature with the greatest power among creatures that player controls.

cards.name: Read the Bones
cards.text: Scry 2, then draw two cards. You lose 2 life. (To scry 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom and the rest on top in any order.)
